message:
test(ssh): add unit tests for SshChildProcess wait/kill and Session lifecycle

Add tests for SSH child process edge cases: closed-channel wait (sync and
async) returning failure status with caching, and kill posting HUP signal
with pipe wakeup. Add tests for SessionSender::send enqueuing requests with
pipe wakeup and Session drop triggering SessionDropped. These cover
previously untested error-path and teardown behavior in the SSH PTY layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
